title: ‘Thulasi’ and ‘Ninna Notavu’: A fresh wave in Kannada indie music
summary: Kannada indie music is finally getting its moment in the spotlight, with catchy new singles such as ‘Tulasi’ and ‘Ninna Notavu’ striking a chord with the younger crowd

title: NC’s Ruhullah, PDP’s Parra criticise J&K CM over his Iran stand, arrests in Kashmir
summary: No NC leader has commented on the J&K Police’s move to lodge a First Information Report (FIR) against Aga Syed Ruhullah for allegedly “creating fear, disturbing public order, and inciting unlawful activities”

title: Iran-Israel War: 50 persons from Karnataka who were stranded in UAE arrive in Delhi
summary: The State Government said that the passengers were provided breakfast, and arrangements were made to transfer them to the domestic terminal of Delhi airport from where they would proceed to Bengaluru, Mangaluru and Hubballi

title: Congress fields Anurag Sharma for lone Rajya Sabha seat in Himachal Pradesh
summary: Anurag Sharma filed his nomination papers for the Rajya Sabha elections scheduled to be held on March 16

title: TN Govt formulates SOP for engaging senior counsels to represent it in SC
Protests against killing of Khamenei: Strict curbs in place in Kashmir valley
summary: A large number of police and paramilitary CRPF personnel were deployed across the city in the early hours to prevent gatherings of protestors, the officials said.

title: Protest in Chikkamagaluru over denial of urs rituals at Bababudangiri shrine
summary: Eddelu Karnataka activists alleged that the Congress party ruling the State was not upholding the syncretic nature of the shrine

title: Mumbai Mayor writes to Gujarat CM for two pairs of lion
summary: Mayor Ritu Tawde has formally requested to Gujarat Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel to provide two pairs of Asiatic lions for the city zoo
